# kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeP2P | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

- [ kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeP2P ](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeP2P)

-  kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeP2P 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeP2P

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeP2P: UInt32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeP2P#Discussion)

Include P2P interfaces when [`kDNSServiceInterfaceIndexAny`](/documentation/dnssd/kdnsserviceinterfaceindexany) is specified. By default, specifying [`kDNSServiceInterfaceIndexAny`](/documentation/dnssd/kdnsserviceinterfaceindexany) does not include P2P interfaces.
